mapper.select: /* wms-outbound-obPackingManager-sql-oracle.xml - selectOutboundHeaderByPreviousOutboundHeaderKey - 박스추가로 신규생성된 릴리즈헤더 정보 조회 */ SELECT OH.CTKEY , OH.OWKEY , OH.WAHDKEY , OH.OBHDKEY , OH.RECOMBOXBARCODE , OH.CLASSIFSPECCD , OH.CBM AS VOL , OH.WEIGHT , COUNT(OD.ICKEY) AS TTICCNT , SUM(OD.EXPCTQTY) AS TTICQTY FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OD ON OH.CTKEY = OD.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = OD.OWKEY AND OH.OBHDKEY = OD.OBHDKEY WHERE OH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND OH.PREOBHDKEY = #{obhdkey} GROUP BY OH.CTKEY , OH.OWKEY , OH.WAHDKEY , OH.OBHDKEY , OH.RECOMBOXBARCODE , OH.CLASSIFSPECCD , OH.CBM , OH.WEIGHT
